title: Trump admin teases second batch of UFO files coming ‘very soon’
description: The Pentagon boasted that over one billion users around the world have visited the government's UFO website and that the 'second release of UAP files are actively being processed for publication on the site.'

title: Man arrested after calling 911 to report zombies, ghosts, UFO, deputies say

Man arrested after calling 911 to report zombies, ghosts, UFO, deputies say
